Skip to contents
metacheck 0.0.1.0
  • Get Started
  • Example Report
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

RetractionWatch data

Source: R/db-retractionwatch.R
retractionwatch.Rd

DOIs and nature of statements from the RetractionWatch database. Use rw_date() to find the date it was downloaded, and rw_update() to update it.

Usage

retractionwatch()

rw()

Format

A data frame with 44784+ rows and 2 columns:

doi

Document ID

retractionwatch

Nature of note(s)

Source

https://api.labs.crossref.org/data/retractionwatch

Value

a data frame

Examples

retractionwatch()
#>                                       doi                  retractionwatch
#> 1                  10.1056/NEJMicm2518379                       Retraction
#> 2                    10.3390/nano14090769                       Correction
#> 3                      10.1039/d1tb01147b                       Retraction
#> 4            10.1371/journal.pone.0048254 Retraction;Expression of concern
#> 5                       10.1002/rev3.3329                       Retraction
#> 6                       10.1002/rev3.3322                       Retraction
#> 7                       10.1002/rev3.3323                       Retraction
#> 8                       10.1002/rev3.3311                       Retraction
#> 9                       10.1002/rev3.3317                       Retraction
#> 10                      10.1002/rev3.3318                       Retraction
#> 11                      10.1002/rev3.3316                       Retraction
#> 12          10.1016/j.heliyon.2024.e37293                       Retraction
#> 13          10.1016/j.heliyon.2023.e14265                       Retraction
#> 14          10.1016/j.heliyon.2021.e07301                       Retraction
#> 15     10.1061/(ASCE)CP.1943-5487.0001030                       Retraction
#> 16           10.1371/journal.pntd.0006397 Retraction;Expression of concern
#> 17          10.1016/S1474-4422(19)30140-1 Correction;Expression of concern
#> 18           10.1371/journal.pone.0031490 Retraction;Expression of concern
#> 19           10.1371/journal.pone.0107533 Retraction;Expression of concern
#> 20             10.1016/j.ijgo.2015.05.034            Expression of concern
#> 21           10.1016/j.ejogrb.2018.06.035            Expression of concern
#> 22              10.1007/s00404-007-0527-x            Expression of concern
#> 23              10.1007/s00404-007-0475-5            Expression of concern
#> 24              10.1007/s00404-009-0951-1            Expression of concern
#> 25              10.1007/s00404-010-1370-z            Expression of concern
#> 26              10.1007/s00404-005-0729-z            Expression of concern
#> 27              10.1080/00016340802638199            Expression of concern
#> 28           10.1016/j.ejogrb.2010.11.015            Expression of concern
#> 29                      10.1111/jog.13077            Expression of concern
#> 30            10.1097/MD.0000000000037589                       Retraction
#> 31          10.1016/j.heliyon.2023.e14149                       Retraction
#> 32                      10.1111/coa.12351                       Retraction
#> 33          10.1016/j.diamond.2024.111307                       Retraction
#> 34                     10.1002/ijgo.12360                       Retraction
